data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or reads that confirm this requirement. There are no details regarding how sensitive identifiers are stored or whether they are hashed where needed, leading to an inconclusive result. Without concrete evidence or assertions related to this requirement, the validation cannot be completed.
gaps: No evidence confirming the privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers (hashed where needed).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers.
